ideal_must_detect.matched_text: purge any file labelled “Master NRIC List (Public)”

Processing of data that is or contains MNPI under the SFA and SGX Listing Rules (e.g., undisclosed acquisition terms, draft earnings) is limited to authorised personnel and logged in the Insider List with deal codenames.

Data minimisation and retention: HR records (NRIC, payroll) retained 7 years post-termination; M&A data room exports retained 6 years from transaction close; insider lists retained at least 5 years pursuant to SGX-ST guidance.

must_detect.matched_text: Processing of data that is or contains MNPI under the SFA and SGX Listing Rules (e.g., undisclosed acquisition terms, draft earnings) is limited to authorised personnel and logged in the Insider List with deal codenames.

Data minimisation and retention: HR records (NRIC, payroll) retained 7 years post-termination; M&A data room exports retained 6 years from transaction close; insider lists retained at least 5 years pursuant to SGX-ST guidance.

201912345K; listed on SGX-ST Mainboard) and Helix & Strand Law Corporation (UEN 201834567C) effective 01/08/2026.
Orida Capital Limited registered office: 88 Marina Forge, #42-01, Singapore 018888.
Contact for PD matters: Data Protection Officer, dpo@oridacap.sg, +65 6123 4567; alternate public helpline 1800-123-4567 is for general enquiries only.
Primary client representative: Ms. Lydia Koh (General Counsel), lydia.koh@oridacap.sg, +65 6900 1122.
Categories of personal data (PDPA, s.2): employee NRIC/FIN, passport numbers, work email/phone, payroll and bank details, and addresses collected for HR, M&A integration, and capital-markets compliance.
For illustration in the insider list template, the following sample identifiers may appear: NRIC S1234567Z and FIN G1234567T (examples only), and Passport No. E34567891 of Mr. Aaron Tan (contract counsel).
Bank disbursements may reference the designated client-trust account at Marlin Bank (SG) Pte. Ltd., a/c 031-224-668-1, held by Helix & Strand Law Corporation for fee escrow.
Processing of data that is or contains MNPI under the SFA and SGX Listing Rules (e.g., undisclosed acquisition terms, draft earnings) is limited to authorised personnel and logged in the Insider List with deal codenames.
Data minimisation and retention: HR records (NRIC, payroll) retained 7 years post-termination; M&A data room exports retained 6 years from transaction close; insider lists retained at least 5 years pursuant to SGX-ST guidance.
Cross-border transfers limited to subprocessors listed in Annex B and rely on PDPC-approved transfer mechanisms; sample reviewer mailbox: sgs-mlro@helixstrandlaw.sg.
Data subjects may submit DSARs to dpo@oridacap.sg; requests sent to “Name of Employee: __________ / NRIC/FIN: __________” on legacy forms will not be actioned until verified via our portal.
Verification may require presenting a masked NRIC (e.g., S123****Z) or company-issued pass; do not email full NRIC/FIN unless instructed over secure channel.
For capital-markets mandates, trading blackout notifications and insider acknowledgments are issued via the Compliance Portal; no orders will be routed based on non-public analyst drafts.
We will not process generic helpline recordings, switchboard logs, or marketing lists collected without consent, and we will purge any file labelled “Master NRIC List (Public)” on discovery.
Queries on retention schedules or MNPI controls may be addressed to compliance@oridacap.sg or to “Head of HR” (role only) for employment records; correspondence to info@oridacap.sg
